lines.speaker: Ambassador Gimblewap
lines.text: I can't believe that I've been made to wait so long.

lines.speaker: Ambassador Gimblewap
lines.text: I have been waiting for an audience with the King for days!

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: Well, he's clearly a busy man.

lines.speaker: Ambassador Gimblewap
lines.text: Bah! I think he's just trying to insult the gnome nation, by making me wait. The cheek of these humans. Just because they're vertically challenged they think they can ignore us.

lines.speaker: Ambassador Gimblewap
lines.text: Hmm. I should be thankful for small mercies, I suppose.

lines.speaker: Ambassador Gimblewap
lines.text: Many thanks. This will help wile away the time whilst I'm waiting for an audience.

lines.speaker: Ambassador Gimblewap
lines.text: You must have had to travel a long way to get this to me. Here's a little something extra as a tip.
